race.description: De Bortoli Wines Takeover Target Stakes (L)
race.comment: HARRY'S YACHT (11) talented gelding chasing his third straight victory. Kept fresh for this after he rounded them up effortlessly over 1400m at Caulfield on March 14. Since fitted with an 800m jump out placing. Tempo suits and makes plenty of appeal fresh. KERGUELEN (9) capable on his day and comes back a level today from a good gate. No Mazu to contend with here, after he warmed up late to run fifth in the G3 Hall Mark Stakes over 1300m at Randwick. Look for him getting out of the pack late. KING OF ROSEAU (2) tough gelding who keeps raising the bar. Smashed a strong field last time out when winning the G3 Liverpool City Cup over 1300m at Randwick on February 28. Back with a searching 1030m trial placing and sure to be thereabouts. ROMEO'S CHOICE (12) unlucky gelding due for a change of luck this prep. Stalks the fast speed and primed with the two trials. Has claims. SWEYNESDAY (3) sharp NZ sprinter gelded over the break. Keep safe from the sticky gate.
